additional_rules.name: use-client-on-page-without-interactivity
additional_rules.message: "use client" directive found — verify this route segment truly requires client-side interactivity
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move interactive parts to a small leaf Client Component. The page/layout itself should remain a Server Component to enable SSR and data fetching.

additional_rules.name: usestate-in-potential-server-component
additional_rules.message: useState detected — ensure this file has "use client" directive, or refactor to a Server Component
additional_rules.fix_hint: If the component only fetches data (no interactivity), remove useState and use async Server Component with direct data fetching. If interactivity is required, add "use client" at the top of the file.

additional_rules.name: img-instead-of-next-image
additional_rules.message: Raw element — use from next/image for automatic optimization
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace with from next/image. Add external hostname to next.config.ts remotePatterns if needed.

additional_rules.name: next-public-secret
additional_rules.message: Sensitive value in NEXT_PUBLIC_ variable — NEXT_PUBLIC_ variables are inlined at build time and visible to all clients
additional_rules.fix_hint: Remove NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix. Access this value only in Server Components, Route Handlers, or Server Actions where it is never sent to the browser.

additional_rules.name: a-tag-for-internal-link
additional_rules.message: Raw <a> for internal link — use <Link> from next/link for client-side navigation
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace <a href="/path"> with <Link href="/path"> from next/link to enable prefetching and client-side navigation without full page reload.

additional_rules.name: server-action-outside-actions
additional_rules.message: Server Action defined outside actions/ directory — consider co-locating server actions in an actions/ directory or alongside the route
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move server action to actions/ directory or a file next to the route that uses it.

additional_rules.name: api-route-naming
additional_rules.message: Next.js API route handler defined outside app/api/ directory
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move API route handlers to app/api/[endpoint]/route.ts for App Router or pages/api/ for Pages Router.
